name: Honey-Glazed Onions
recipeInstructions:
-------------
To prepare the glaze, whisk together 1/2 cup honey, 3 tablespoons Dijon mustard, 2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar, 1 teaspoon paprika, 1/2 teaspoon ground ginger, and 1.5 teaspoons salt in a separate bowl. To assemble the onions, peel each onion and slice it in half along its equator, removing the centers to create bowls in the halves. Fill the onion hollows with the breadcrumb mixture and arrange them in a shallow baking dish, surrounding them with water at the bottom. Pour half of the glaze over the onions and bake for 30 minutes. Add more glaze and return to the oven for another 30 minutes. Just before serving, sprinkle additional breadcrumbs on top and broil until golden brown.
